race.comment: Lots of these out of form or making up the numbers. STAR PERFORMER (10) was placed this course and distance two back then dropped back to a mile last time and was well off best. Back to 2000m here and well worth another chance. JUST BOBBY (3) is the sole last start winner in the race and was strong to the line, sitting off pace and drawing clear. Looks as though will run the trip and senior hoop sticks. Go close again with any luck from the wide gate. SIR JAG (5) just never wins but is rarely far away. Ticking along ok and can feature with the right run. THE TAZWEGIAN (11) is going better than it looks and appeals over the longer trip. Got home hard from the back last time and looks a leading chance in this. LYCO RECO (7) is fitter for two runs back and can improve.
